title: Khawzawlah Green Mizoram Day 2026 hman a ni
content:
947/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl 11th June 2026:Vawiina Mizoram puma Green Mizoram Day 2026 hman mek chu Khawzawlah pawh hman a ni a.  hawnna inkhawm hi DC Confernce hall, Khawzawlah neih niin Chairman, District Level Committee on Green Mizoram Day leh Khawzawl District Bawrhsap nibawk Pu K Vanlalthiana  hova hman a ni

Green Mizoram Day hawnna inkhawm  hi Pu C. Pazawna, Chairman Khawzawl Joint VC in a kaihhruai a Khawzawl District Bawrhsap chuan thu sawiin, Green Mizoram Day. sorkarin hmang tura min tih avang chauh hmang kan ni lova, keimahni tan, kan tu leh fate tan kan hmang a ni a ti a, thing hi kan nunna hnar a nih angin keimahni tan thing kan phun dawn a ni a ti bawk.    Bawrhsap chuan bawlhhlawh sawngbawl dan thar tur chungchang pawh sawi langin Supreme Court chuan Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026 hman dan tur chungchangah ram pum huap thupek a tih chhuah angin bawlhhlawh hi chi li (4) ah then a ni thawh dawn a, hei hi Khawzawl district-ah kalpui thuai a nih tur thu sawiin head of office leh zirna in lama bul tan a ni dawn a, hemi hnu hian mipui lamah kalpui chhunzawm ve leh ang a ti bawk.

He hunah hian Member Secretary, Pu Lalnunthanga, DFO, hnen atangin report ngaihthlak a ni a, kumin chhunga kangmei venna lama titha khuate hnenah lawmman semna neih niin pawisa fai leh Citation hlan an ni a, 1st - Lungtan - Rs. 75,000/-, 2nd - Tualte - Rs. 50,000/-, 3rd - Rabung - Rs. 40,000/-, Tin Khaw pathum  Chalrang, Chhawrtui, Kawlkulh North te hnenah Consolation Prize cheng 10,000 leh Citation pek an ni bawk.Pu Rosiama, President, Sub-Hqrt in lawmthu sawiin a hawnna inkhawm hi a khar a ni.

Hawnna inkhawm zawh hian National Highway (NH-6) Tuisen phai leh Tuichang inkar kawng sir ah thing phun nghal niin, Official te, Office hrang hrangte, NGO hrang hrang aiawhte bakah Khawzawl Higher Secondary School ten an phun a, thing tiak hi a vaiin 546 an phun a ni.

Attachment

title: Green Mizoram Day 2026 Hnahthialah hman a ni
content:
946/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 11th June, 2026:Vawiin khan Green Mizoram Day 2026 chu Mizoram puman hman a ni a. Hemi pual hian Hnahthial District ah pawh hman ve niin "Thing hi rangkachak anga hlu, Nunna tinreng bul a ni" tih thupui a hmangin Hnahthial By Pass Road kawng sir hmun hrang hrangah thingphun hnatlang neih a ni. Hunserh tawi hman a ni a, Pi K. Vanlalruati, District Bawrhsap chu khuallian niin, Pu Henry Saplalrinliana, Senior Scientist & Head, KVK, Hnahthial in he hun hi a kaihruai. Green Mizoram Day 2026 pual hian Hnahthial District chhunga Sawrkar pisa hrang hranga te leh NGO hrang hrang ten thingtiak zahnih sawmriat panga (285) an phun.

Bawrhsap, Pi K.Vanlalruati chuan thu sawiin Kum 1998 atang khan Green Aizawl tiin he ni hi hman tan alo ni tawh a, zau zawk a hman chhunzawm zel a nih theih nan Kum 1999 khan Green Mizoram Day ti a thlak a nih thu a sawi a, Green Mizoram in a tum ber chu kawngkam, sorkar leh mimal hmun remchang lai apiang a thingphun a, Mizoram chu ram nuam taka siam a ni, chu mi tur chuan kum tin thingtiak tamtak district capital-ah leh district khaw hrang hrang ah te phun thin a ni a ti. Khuallian chuan kan thingphun te vil zui a, a puitling ngei theihna tura enkawl zui theuh turin a chah a, Green Mizoram Day 2026 thupui "Thing hi rangkachak anga hlu, Nunna tinreng bul a ni" tih chu a taka an chan ngei theih nan leh kan ram leilung ti mawi a ti hlawhtling turin mahni hma zawn theuh ah tan la a, kan tu leh fate tana chenna nuam zawk siam turin a sawm.

Pi Lawmnapari Working Plan Officer (South) Lunglei pawh in he hun hi hmanpuiin Mizoram in ramngaw kan neih that avangin sorkar laipuiin sum tam tak a pek belh thu a sawi a, heihi a chhan ber chu VC, YMA leh milmal tin ten rawmngaw kan humhalh that vang a ni a ti. Hun lo kal zel turah thingzai chu kan la mamawh zel tur a ni a, chumi tur chuan thingphun uar deuh deuh a, thing pakhat kan zai apiangin thing tiak dang pakhat tal phun belh zel a pawimawh thu a sawi a. Hnahthial chu khaw thenkhat te tih dang anga Eco Tourisam lama hma kan sawn theih nan, kan kawngkam hmun remchang lai apiangah thingkung par mawi chi te phun a, khualzin tamtak hip thei tura tan la turin a chah bawk.

Green Mizoram Day pual hian MHIP, MJA, MUP, VC Association, YMA Sub Headquarters leh Hnahthial Officers' Club (HOC) te chuan thing phun hnatlang an neih bawk.

Attachment

title: Chief Justice of Gauhati High Court, Justice Ashutosh Kumar, Attends Green Mizoram Day Organized by Mizoram State Legal Services Authority (MSLSA)
content:
161/2026-2027Aizawl; June 11, 2026:Today, the Mizoram State Legal Services Authority (MSLSA) organized an awareness program on the importance of mass tree plantation to mark Green Mizoram Day at the Gauhati High Court Office premises, MINECO, Khatla.

Justice Ashutosh Kumar, Chief Justice of the Gauhati High Court and Patron-in-Chief of MSLSA, graced the event as the Chief Guest. He was accompanied by Justice Michael Zothankhuma (Judge, Judge-in-Charge of Administration Department (JAD), Gauhati High Court, and Executive Chairman of Assam State Legal Services Authority) and Justice Sanjeev Kumar Sharma (Judge, Gauhati High Court). The theme for this year's Green Mizoram Day is "Trees are green gold, The roots of all life." To commemorate the day, the Chief Guest along with other officials planted tree saplings.

Addressing the gathering, Chief Justice Ashutosh Kumar noted that Green Mizoram Day originally began in 1998 as "Green Aizawl Day" and was later observed state-wide as "Green Mizoram Day" on June 11 every year starting from 1999. He highlighted that more than 4.6 million (46 lakh) saplings have been planted across various locations since the inception of this day.

Expressing his appreciation for this year's theme, the Chief Justice emphasized that trees are incredibly valuable to us as they conserve groundwater, prevent soil erosion, and release clean air essential for life. He remarked that although Mizoram is a small state geographically within India, it is blessed with rich forests, diverse wildlife, and an excellent climate with clean, pleasant air. He stressed that it is vital to strictly protect and preserve the state's flora, fauna, and forests.

During the event, Chief Justice Ashutosh Kumar planted a Herhse (Ironwood/Mesua ferrea) sapling near the Gauhati High Court, Aizawl Bench Office. Other officials present also took part in planting saplings to mark the occasion.

The program organized by MSLSA was chaired by Vincent Lalrokima, MJS, Member Secretary of the Mizoram State Legal Services Authority. The event witnessed a full attendance of Mizoram Judicial Officers, Law Department Officers, officials from the Gauhati High Court Aizawl Bench, members of the Mizoram Bar Association, and Law College students. Additionally, staff members of the Legal Services Authority also planted numerous saplings in the Ainawn locality.

Attachment

title: Pu Justice Ashutosh Kumar, Chief Justice of Gauhati High Court chuan Green Mizoram Day, Mizoram State Legal Services Authority (MSLSA) te a hman pui
content:
945/2026-2027

Aizawl; 11th June, 2026:Vawiin khan Mizoram State Legal Services Authority (MSLSA) chuan Green Mizoram Day pualin Gauhati High Court Office peng, MINECO, Khatla-ah thing phun uar a tulzia inzirtirna hun an hmang. He programme-ah hian Pu Justice Ashutosh Kumar, Chief Justice, Gauhati Court leh Patron-in-Chief, Mizoram State Legal Services Authority ni bawk chu khuallian niin; Pu Justice Michael Zothankhuma, Judge, Judge-in-Charge, Administration Department (JAD), Gauhati High Court leh Executive Chairman, Assam State Legal Services Authority leh Pu Justice Sanjeev Kumar Sharma, Judge, Gauhati High Court ten an hmanpui. Kumin Green Mizoram Day thupui chu “Thing hi rangkachak anga hlu, Nunna tinreng bul a ni” tih a ni a. He ni pual hian khuallian leh official dang ten thingtiak an phun a ni.

Pu Justice Ashutosh Kumar, Chief Justice, Gauhati High Court chuan Green Mizoram Day chu kum 1998 khan Green Aizawl Day tia hman tan a nih thu leh kum 1999 atangin June ni 11 hi kum tinin Green Mizoram Day tia hman chhoh tan a nih thu a sawi a. Green Mizoram Day hman a nih atangin thingtiak nuai 46 chuang zet hmun hrang hrangah phun a nih tawh thu a sawi bawk. Kumina Green Mizoram Day thupui “Trees are green gold, The roots of all life” atana thlan a ni hi tha a tih thu sawiin; thingte hi kan tan an hlu hle a, lei hnuaia tui khawltu, lei min tur vengtu leh nunna atana pawimawh tak boruak thianghlim pe chhuaktu an nih thu te a sawi a. Mizoram chu India ram bung hrang hrang zingah ram zimte ni mah se, ramngaw, nungcha leh sik leh sa thatna hmun a ni a, boruak a nuamin a thiang hle a; thing leh mau, nungcha leh ramngaw te hi humhalh tlat a tul a ni, a ti.

Pu Justice Ashutosh Kumar, Chief Justice, Gauhati High Court chuan Gauhati High Court, Aizawl Bench Office bulah Herhse a phun nghal a. Official dang te pawn he ni pual hian thingtiak an phun bawk a ni.

MSLSA buatsaih Green Mizoram Day hmanna programme hi Pu Vincent Lalrokima, MJS, Member Secretary, Mizoram State Legal Services Authority chuan a kaihruai a. He hunah hian Mizoram Judicial Officer te, Law Department Officer te, Gauhati High court, Aizawl Bench Officer te, Mizoram Bar Association Member te leh Law College Zirlai te an tel kim hle. Legal Services Authority staff ten Ainawn vengah thingtiak engemaw zat an phun nghal bawk.

Attachment

title: Saitualah Green Mizoram Day 2026  hman a ni
content:
944/2026-2027

Saitual, the 11th June, 2026 :"Thing hi rangkachak anga hlu, Nunna tinreng bul a ni’ tih thupui hmangin vawiin khan Saitual District Level Committee on Green Mizoram Day 2026 bultumin GMD hman a ni. He ni puala inkhawm tawi hi Keifang Venghlun YMA Zawlbukah tukin zing dar 7 khan neih a ni a,  ACF & Member Secretary Pu  Andrew Lalthlamuana'n hun kaihruaiin  Pu Lallawmawma, Addl. DC, Saitual chu khuallian niin hun a hmanpui.

Khuallian chuan thing pawimawh zia tarlangin mihringte leh nungchate hi tui leh boruak tel lovin kan khawsa thei lo a, tui leh boruak siamtu pawinawh ber leh an innghahna chu thing a nih avangin thing tel lo chuan kan khawsa thei lo tih a chiang viau a ni, ti a.

Chumi a nih avang chuan thingphun hi sawrkar, khawtlang hruaitu emaw tlawmngai pawl kuta dah chi a ni lo a, mimal, chhungkua ah a pawimawhna kan inzirtir thar atul hle tih a sawi.

Khuallian chuan ram hmasawnna kal zelah kawngpui leh building tha zawk kan mamawh avangin thing leh mau ten nasa takin a tuar a, chumi ti ziawm tur chuan thingphun hi tha thlah lova kan uar a tul a, a tuartu tur chu keimahni tho kan ni tih a chiang viau tih a sawi bawk. Khuallian chuan kan ram tlawhtu khawvel hmun hrang hrang atangin an thahnem sawt hle a, an rawn hmuh duh chu Aizawl leh khawpui dang ni lovin ram ralmuang, tlang ram hmuh nuam, boruak thianghlim, tiau chhum, ni chhuak leh ni tla nena inchawih em em te hian an rilru a hneh ber thin a, khang phenah khan kan thing leh mau te hi an pawimawh hle a ni a ti a, kan ram rawn tlawhtu te hnen atanga sum lakluh dan kan ngaihtuah thiam te hi a pawimawh hle tih a sawi bawk.

Pu Lallawmawma chuan vawiina thingphuna hun hmang tur zawng zawngte duhsakna a hlan rualin a enkawl kawngah tha thlah lova puitling ngei tura tan la theuh turin a chah a, Saitual District-a GMD 2026 hmangtu zawng te thawhhopui ah a sawm a ni.

Hun hmannaah hian District Level Committee on Fire Prevention Saitual District ten kangmei veng tha leh lemziak hmanga intihsiak a buatsaih lawmnan sem chhunzawm a ni a, hengte hi an lawmman an dawn dan a ni.

Kangmei Veng tha dawngtute:

1st prize Saitual VC - I

2nd prize Vanbawng VC

3rd prize Changzawl YMA

Lemziak lawmman dawngtute :

1st prize Lalnunthari Govt. PS - II Keifang

2nd Prize Lalnunmawii Saitual High School - II

3rd prize Lalhmingchhuangi Govt PS Keifang

Hun hman zawh hian khuallian Addl. DC Pu Lallawmawma leh SDPO Pu Hmingthansanga ten zawlbuk tualah thingtiak an phun nghal a ni.

GMD 2026 puala hun hmanna ah hian District Level Committee on Green Mizoram Day 2026 Committee member te leh sawm bik ten hun an hmang a ni.

Saitual District ah GMD 2026 pual hian Zirna In hrang hrang ten an remchan dan angin thingphun hnatlang an nei  a, Sub Hqrs YMA pawhin an hmun neih Sub Hqrs YMA Rosangi Memorial Park ah thingphun hnatlang an nei a, kum kalta lama kawng dunga thingphun hmunhma tihfai tura mawhphurhna nei ten hun an hmang bawk a ni. GMD 2026 pual hian Saitual Forest Department chuan thing tiak 2700 zet an pe chhuak a ni.

Attachment

title: Governor Participates in Green Mizoram Day Plantation Drive
content:
160/2026-2027Aizawl, the 11th June, 2026 :Mizoram Governor, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd), led the plantation drive on Green Mizoram Day 2026 by planting a sapling of the State Tree, Herhse(Mesua ferrea), at the Upper Lawn of Lok Bhavan this morning. Following the Governor’s lead, staff members of the Governor's Secretariat also planted saplings at the venue.

Speaking on the occasion, the Governor General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh commended the state for its annual mass tree plantation drive on Green Mizoram Day. He urged citizens to plant as many saplings as possible throughout the current planting season and not limit their efforts to just Green Mizoram Day. Highlighting the importance of environmental conservation, the Governor noted that Mizoram continues to maintain rich forest cover and healthy ecosystems. He emphasised that these forests play a crucial role in regulating the climate, purifying the air, and sustaining the water cycle, and called upon the people to actively protect these natural resources in the face of climate change. He further encouraged all participants not to restrict their efforts to mere planting, but to also ensure proper care and maintenance of the saplings so they grow into healthy, mature trees.

Present on the occasion were Mr. Vinod P. Kavle, Commissioner & Secretary to the Governor; Mr. Lalnunsanga Khawlhring, Divisional Forest Officer, Aizawl Forest Division; Mr. K. Laltlawmlova, Joint Secretary to the Governor, along with other staff from Governor's Secretariat and the Environment, Forests & Climate Change Department.

Attachment

title: Larsap-in Green Mizoram Day pualin thing tiak a phun
content:
943/2026-2027Aizawl, the 11th of June, 2026 :Mizoram Larsap, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) chuan Green Mizoram Day 2026 thingphun hnatlangpui hma hruaiin tukin khan Upper Lawn, Lok Bhavan-ah Mizoram State Tree'Herhse'tiak a phun. Larsap hnung zui hian Governor's Secretariat-a thawktu ten thing tiak an phun a ni.

Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh chuan Green Mizoram Day puala thingphun runpui kum tina neih thin chu tha a tih thu sawiin, hemi ni chauh ni lo, thingphun hun chhunga thing tiak tam thei ang ber phun turin mipuite a chah a. Hmun dang ngaihtuahin Mizoramin hmun hring leh thing leh mau a nei tha rih tih sawiin, hengte hi Mizoram sik leh sa tinuama, boruak tithianghlima, ruahtui tlak dan thlenga danglamna thlentu an ni a, sik leh sa inthlak danglam zel tur ven nan kan humhalh a tul a ni, a ti a. Mizoram puma Green Mizoram Day hmangtute chu thing tiak phunah tawpsan mai lova, a puitlin ngei theih nan a enkawl zui zel kawngah theihtawp chhuah chhunzawm turin a chah a ni.

Tukin Lok Bhavan-a Green Mizoram Day puala hun hmanah hian Pu Vinod P. Kavle, Commissioner & Secretary to Governor, Pu Lalnunsanga Khawlhring, Divisional Forest Officer, Aizawl Forest Division, Pu K. Laltlawmlova, Joint Secretary to Governor bakah Governor's Secretariat leh Environment, Forests & Climate Change Department hnuaia thawktute an tel a ni.

Attachment
